environment_prompt: Neon-lit rooftop in a cyberpunk city at night. Massive holographic billboards with neon text light up surrounding skyscrapers. The street far below is crowded with vehicles and red taillights. Steam vents from rooftop machinery billow white clouds. Light rain drizzles, reflecting neon colors everywhere. Dark, moody, neon-noir atmosphere. Through the electronic scanning goggles at 6x digital zoom, the crowded street below reveals individual pedestrians with thermal signatures, a target figure in a long coat moving through the crowd, food stall awnings, and flying delivery drones weaving between the lower building levels.
perspective_prompt: First-person view standing on the rooftop edge, looking out over the sprawling cyberpunk cityscape below.

interactions.prompt: The character aims down the sights. The view transitions into a electronic scanning goggle HUD with thermal overlay, target identification markers, and 6x digital zoom.
The character lowers the weapon. The view returns to normal first-person perspective.
